title: Add T1000-E Renode model
description: Compose a faithful-enough T1000-E model from nRF52840, LR1110, board GPIO/SPIM wiring, deterministic AG3335 UART behavior, USB CDC/SMP endpoints, and stable FICR identity.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical T1000-E gateway and puck firmware reach late app oracles and simulator-observed LR1110 TX; model boundaries explicitly exclude UF2 layout, GNSS RF, USB electrical behavior, and real LoRa RF proof.
